payload.description: Compare the published champion guidelines and current live champion implementations for Medication Review: Dosage and Medication Review: Individual Confirmation. Record concrete inconsistencies, conflicts, translation gaps, and risky ambiguities in decision logic, scope, enrollment-type handling, thresholds, exclusions, ambiguity handling, and evidence standards. No edits in this task; audit only.
payload.title: Audit Medication Review Dosage and Individual Confirmation champion code against champion guidelines
